shareable_note: This file contains only aggregate overnight-tournament metrics and conclusions. Raw run directories, predictions, adapters, checkpoints, and other large artifacts remain local and ignored.

stop_rule_outcome.reason: Stopped after balanced_ibes_10k: it beat the 1k adapter on at least three public benchmarks while preserving IBES performance.

baseline_roles.adapter_1k: Best general finance adapter before the overnight tournament.
baseline_roles.adapter_10k: Best narrow IBES structured JSON specialist before the overnight tournament.

high_quality_ibes_4k.interpretation: Cleaner smaller data preserved direction classification but severely regressed IBES exact JSON and magnitude fidelity, and it still lost on most public benchmarks versus the 1k adapter.

balanced_ibes_10k.interpretation: Best overnight candidate. It preserved IBES structured performance while beating the 1k adapter on FPB, TFNS, and NWGI, with only a small FiQA regression.

decision_summary.best_structured_ibes_model_overall: 10k adapter remains the narrowest IBES JSON specialist overall.
decision_summary.remaining_market_reaction_blocker: Formal CRSP/Compustat link table is still missing.
